title: DeepSeeMize
description: A optimization modpack for a VERY weak computer.
body:
# 🚀 DeepSeeMize Modpack  
**Ultra-Lightweight Fabric Optimization for Potato PCs**  
*Minecraft Performance Magic for Weak Hardware*

---

## 🔥 **What This Does**  
DeepSeeMize transforms Minecraft into a **buttery-smooth experience** on low-end hardware (like GTX 760/Xeon setups!). Expect **2-3x FPS boosts**, reduced stutters, and faster loading times without sacrificing vanilla gameplay.

---

## 🛠️ **Key Features**  
- **500+ FPS Possible** on weak GPUs/CPUs (with tweaked settings)  
- **RAM & CPU Optimizations** - Runs smoothly on 2-4GB RAM systems  
- **No Visual Downgrades** - Keeps vanilla look while boosting performance  
- **1-Click Install** via Modrinth  

---

## 📦 **Mod List**  
*(Carefully selected for maximum potato-power)*  

| Mod | Function | Performance Impact |
|-----|----------|-------------------|
| [**Sodium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) | GPU Rendering Optimizations | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) | CPU Logic & Physics Boost | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) | RAM Usage Reduction | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**Entity Culling**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) | Renders Only Visible Entities | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**Krypton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) | Network Stack Optimization | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**Memory Leak Fix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) | Prevents RAM Bloat | ⭐⭐⭐ |
| [**Fastload**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastload) | 60% Faster World Loading | ⭐⭐ |
| [**LazyDFU**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) | Speeds Up Game Startup | ⭐⭐ |
| [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) | Reduces BG Resource Usage | ⭐ |

---

## ⚙️ **Recommended Settings**  
*(For maximum FPS on weak hardware)*  
```yaml
Render Distance: 8 chunks  
Graphics: Fast  
Clouds: Off  
Particles: Minimal  
Smooth Lighting: OFF  
Entity Shadows: OFF  
```
> **Pro Tip:** In Sodium settings → Enable **Entity Culling** + **Compact Vertex Format**

---

## 💻 **System Requirements**  
| Component | Minimum | Recommended |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| GPU | Intel HD 4000 / NVIDIA 600 Series | GTX 750 Ti+ |
| CPU | 2-core @ 2.0GHz | 4-core @ 2.5GHz+ |
| RAM | 2GB allocated | 4GB allocated |
| OS | Windows 7+ | Windows 10 |

---

## ⬇️ **Installation**  
1. Download via **Modrinth App** (auto-installs)  
2. Manual: Import `.mrpack` into Prism Launcher  
3. **No Java edits needed!**

---

> 🥔 **Potato-Approved** on:  
> - NVIDIA GTX 760 (2GB)
